## Summary

Side-quest analysis session: measured cached-prompt usage/cost across all Claude Code transcripts Jul 11-12 (66 sessions, 1,891 calls) and published the "Context rent" artifact comparing Claude Code-native continuity vs sofar-record continuity. No library-surface code touched.
